beats.description: aerial view of small Mediterranean island, terra-cotta rooftops, whitewash walls, harbor of glass-still water, fishing boats at dock, autumn light
harbor close-up, fishing nets drying on dock in afternoon sun, painted fishing boats knocking against each other, cat asleep on coiled rope
man in suit walking narrow stone streets, jacket over his arm, village nearly empty, faded cafe awning, cracked church bell tower, grocer's with crates outside
small spare room, white walls, dark blue shutters thrown open, narrow bed, wooden chair, through window the harbor below, gold evening light on water
man on cafe terrace at dusk, wine glass, unreadable newspaper spread before him, relaxed posture but eyes glancing sideways, Mediterranean dusk
hillside above village, scrub and stone in late light, view looking down at village and harbor from above, distant figure on cafe terrace below
close-up on man's face, faintest smile, eyes narrowed with amusement, wine glass raised to lips, Mediterranean dusk light
morning, man in suit descending stone harbor steps, below another man sitting on seawall legs dangling over water eating an orange, hat pushed back, dusty boots
close-up of hands peeling orange with hunting knife, long sun-darkened fingers separating segments, orange juice sticky at wrist, loose easy grip on the blade
two men passing each other on seawall, neither looking at the other, one walking past without breaking stride, Mediterranean harbor morning
man emerging from grocer's with paper bag, seawall empty, curl of orange peel drying on stone where someone sat, morning light
cafe mid-morning, two men at separate tables, silver-haired woman owner bringing espresso to each, Mediterranean village cafe
rugged man leaning forward, cup in both hands, elbows on table, other man behind newspaper, one hand turning a page, posture upright and still
two men's eyes meeting over top of newspaper, one with slight raised eyebrow, other with head tilted and jaw set, cafe table between them
man rising from cafe table, adjusting hat, walking toward harbor with long unhurried stride, other man watching him go over the edge of his newspaper
late afternoon golden light, stone jetty at end of harbor, rugged man sitting against mooring post reading battered bird guide, sea turning to honey
suited man arriving at jetty, hand gesturing toward opposite mooring post, other man shrugging without looking up from book
man seated on jetty producing cigarette case, smoke curling over darkening water, case held open toward other man
man dog-earing page of book, other man wincing at the gesture, taking a cigarette from offered case
close-up of two men's faces lit by lighter flame, one leaning in close, other studying him in flickering light, deep lines around eyes, scratches on forearms, faces inches apart
man exhaling cigarette smoke toward horizon on jetty, leaning back against mooring post, one arm draped over knee, darkening sky over water
close-up of two men on jetty at dusk, suited man's lips parted mid-sentence, other man turned toward him with chin lifted, faces close, last light on the water behind them
rugged man on jetty holding cigarette loosely between fingers, looking out at dark water, jaw set, eyes narrowed toward the horizon, dusk
two men on jetty at dusk, one leaning forward, other turned to face him fully, steady direct eye contact between them, last golden light on the water
man walking coastal trail alone, scrub and wind, island falling away to sea on every side, white foam on black stone below, single figure on the path
man sitting in wooden chair by open window, late afternoon light on his face, village rooftops visible below, alone in spare room
man at mirror freshly shaved, thumb along jaw, adjusting tie and cuffs carefully, precise deliberate grooming, evening light
man eating alone at cafe terrace, grilled fish potatoes salad carafe of wine, lamplight, fork paused mid-air, eyes half-closed, evening
second man seated in chair across table, hat tossed onto the table between them, leaning back with arms crossed, cafe terrace evening lamplight
cafe owner setting second plate down, man raising hand to signal for another carafe, eyes on the other man eating across the table, lamplight
two men at dinner table, one eating hungrily with bread in one hand and fork in the other, other cutting fish with precise small movements, cafe terrace lamplight
close-up of man's face, head thrown back in sudden laughter, eyes creased shut, mouth open, the controlled expression completely gone, cafe lamplight
close-up of rugged man's face in lamplight, eyes wide and still, slight parting of lips, watching someone across the table, head tilted forward
man reaching for wine glass with a lingering half-smile, other man returning to his plate, cafe table between them, lamplight evening
empty terrace, cafe owner sweeping around two remaining men, village dark except corner lamp and low white moon grazing the water
two men walking side by side to stone steps, behind a shutter someone washing dishes, their arms nearly touching, night village
two men standing close at foot of stone steps, facing each other, hands at their sides, weight shifted toward each other, moonlight and lamplight
close-up of suited man's face at night, lips barely moving, brow softened, eyes searching the other man's face, moonlight and lamplight
rugged man looking at the ground, harbor behind him with boats motionless in dark water, looking back with brow lifted, lips parted, eyes wide and undefended
rugged man rubbing back of his neck, mouth open mid-word, other man leaning in with a slight nod, both close together at the stone steps at night
man standing on first step turned back, the added height putting them exactly eye to eye, mouth open to speak, the other man's hand raised palm-out, stone steps in moonlight
close-up of rugged man, barest smile visible under brim of hat, one hand touching the hat brim, moonlight on his face
man standing alone on stone step in moonlight, empty cobblestone street below, solitary figure, church bell tower in background
small white room, man sitting on edge of narrow bed, tie loosened, harbor light through window, alone
man in white room unbuttoning shirt collar, standing by narrow bed, bare walls, dim harbor light, shoulders rounded, head bowed
jacket hung on bedpost, man lying back on narrow bed feet on floor shoes still on, harbor lights painting shifting shapes on ceiling
close-up of man's face, eyes open and still in dark room, harbor light reflections drifting across the ceiling above him
close-up of man's hand pressed flat to his own chest in dark room, lying on bed, harbor light reflections on ceiling above
